The '''Red Twins spaceport''' was a small [[Space station/Legends|space station]] orbiting the dying [[Star/Legends|stars]] known as the [[The Red Twins/Legends|Red Twins]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Built during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], it was run by independent [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and became a haven for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] in the months following the [[Declaration of a New Order]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Ferus Olin]] once visited the spaceport.<ref name="TDM">''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]''</ref>

{{Station-stub}}

*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' {{1st}}
